[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001011 5
1 00100010 2
2 01100110 4
3 00010011 3
4 11100000 3
5 11001011 5
6 01010000 2
7 10101010 4

67 76 10100111 5
70 07 01111111 7

71 17 11000001 3

47 74 11000110 4
50 05 00100010 2 match 1
61 16 01100110 4 match 2
72 27 00010011 3 match 3

26 62 10110100 4
37 73 11101101 6
